name: healthcare_recall_notice_arrives_harbor_jus_mer
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare recall notice arrives harbor jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Priya Mensah
agents.identity: I am Priya Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Luc Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Luc Nielsen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Priya Mensah must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Priya Mensah do?
